reviews.comment:
Es medio lerda la fila para cargar por qué cuando fui había un playero pero después es una YPF más, el full es muy bueno.

The line to load is a bit slow because when I went there was a beach bar, but then it's more of a YPF, the full bar is very good.

reviews.comment:
Está bien ubicada, buena atención por parte del playero menos del compañero me pareció poco amable y empático. Atienden rápido, los baños no se porque no fuí.

(Translated by Google)
It's well located, and the service from the attendant was good, except for his colleague, who seemed unfriendly and unsympathetic. Service is quick, but I didn't use the restrooms.

reviewReply.comment: Hola pedón por lo del compañero
